theme: What HR directors say after working with us

linkedin.text:
"I used to dread planning the annual company event. Now I just call Alon."

— HR Director, leading Israeli tech company (200+ employees)

Here's what she told us after 3 events together:

"The first time, I was skeptical. Another event company promising the moon. But from the first call, it was different. They asked about our culture, our challenges, our people — not just the budget.

The event in Athens exceeded every expectation. My CEO pulled me aside after the awards dinner and said: 'This is the best thing we've ever done for our people.'

Since then, we've done Barcelona and Prague with them. Each one better than the last. My team's engagement scores are at an all-time high.

The ROI isn't just retention. It's reputation. We're now known as the company that takes care of its people."

Ready to become that company?

📩 alon@upe.co.il

Alon Ouaknine

#Testimonial #CorporateEvents #IncentiveTravel #HRLeadership #EmployeeEngagement #UproductionEvents #EventProduction
